/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/auth/Auth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/features/JoinSkyblock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/features/ChatLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/cofl/CoflNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/cofl/CoflSessionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/features/AutoOpen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/features/QueueManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/features/AutoBuy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/util/FlipItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/features/Failsafes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/util/Objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/util/Colors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/util/ColorConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/features/Stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/util/Logger.cpp.o -o client  libmclib.a -lixwebsocket -luuid /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so
